title: AN ACT DECLARING THE CENTRAL CATANDUANES (BOCTOT) PARK IN THE PROVINCE OF CATANDUANES AS THE ALBERTO NATIONAL MEMORIAL PARK.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4653 / 69 OG No. 8, 1375 (February 19, 1973)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6610, October 23, 1972 ]

AN ACT DECLARING THE CENTRAL CATANDUANES (BOCTOT) PARK IN THE PROVINCE OF CATANDUANES AS THE ALBERTO NATIONAL MEMORIAL PARK.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Central Catanduanes (Boctot) Park in the Province of Catanduanes is hereby declared as Alberto National Memorial Park.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved.

GIL J. PUYAT

CORNELIO T. VILLAREAL

President of the Senate

Secretary of the House of Representatives

Finally passed by the Senate on September 4, 1972

This Act, which origin the House of Representative, was finally passed by the April 25, 1972.

ELISEO M. TENZA

INOCENCIO B. PAREJA

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary of the House Representatives

Approved: October 23, 1972

FERDINAND E. MARCOS

President of the Philippines
